basic_details.short_information: IIA Upper Division Clerk Recruitment 2026 notification is out to fill 05 vacancies across Karnataka. Candidates with Any Bachelors Degree Can Apply Online. The online application opens on 29-05-2026, and closes on 29 -06-2026. The candidate shall apply online through IIA website, iiap.res.in.

how_to_apply: Eligible candidates must complete the online application process:
